title: All data sources and computing services are considered resources
description: Treat every Azure resource as a sensitive resource — VMs, storage, KV, SQL

title: All communication is secured regardless of network location
description: Encrypt all traffic — HTTPS, TLS 1.2+, private endpoints

title: Access to enterprise resources is granted on a per-session basis
description: Use Azure AD CAP, PIM time-bound activation

title: Access to resources is determined by dynamic policy
description: Use risk-based CAP and adaptive auth

title: The enterprise monitors and measures integrity and security posture of all owned assets
description: Use Defender for Cloud, secure score monitoring

title: All resource authentication and authorization are dynamic and strictly enforced
description: Just-in-time access, MFA, no standing privilege

title: Enterprise collects information about asset state for posture improvement
description: Diagnostic settings, Sentinel, activity log retention
